name: com.unity.polybrush
description: Mesh painting, sculpting, and geo-scattering tool for Unity.

samples.description: Polybrush shader examples compatible with Unity Standard rendering pipeline.
Polybrush shader examples compatible with Unity Universal rendering pipeline.
Polybrush shader examples compatible with Unity High Definition rendering pipeline.

_upm.changelog:
- Added an Align to Normal option for prefab scattering.
- Reworked prefab brush raycasting to use a lightweight physics path that avoids adding PolybrushMesh components to prefab targets.
- Improved brush target selection so mesh-editing tools stay restricted to selected paintable objects while preserving deselected paint targets during painting.
- Fixed paint brush target cleanup when secondary brush targets exit without entering.
- Improved Command-key modifier support on macOS and brush repaint behavior.
